name: Set up BigCommerce
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": The BigCommerce integration is available upon application. Please "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "contact us"}]}, {"text": " if you would like to have this enabled on your account."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Before you Begin"}], "data-id": "2"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Before you connect your Neto control panel to BigCommerce, you will need to prepare the API key, shipping, and payment methods:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a BigCommerce API account by following "}, {"text": "these steps"}, {"text": " in the BigCommerce help centre. Set the OAuth scopes as per the table below:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Only store owners can create API keys in BigCommerce."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting Name"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting Value"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Customers"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "read-only"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Information & settings"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "modify"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Orders"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "modify"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Order transactions"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "read-only"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "modify"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-64fff687"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Record the "}, {"text": "API Path", "bold": true}, {"text": " (the part between store/ and /v3), "}, {"text": "Client ID", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Client Secret", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Access Token", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Make a note of the exact names of your payment methods in BigCommerce. These will be mapped to Neto equivalents during setup, so if need be, add any as "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/810-offline-payment-methods", "children": [{"text": "offline payment methods"}]}, {"text": " in Neto so payments can be reconciled."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Make a note of the exact names of your shipping options in BigCommerce. These will be mapped to Neto equivalents during setup, and will appear on orders automatically to make dispatching orders a smooth process."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the BigCommerce Integration"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To connect your Neto control panel to BigCommerce and set up the This will allow Neto to update the price and stock levels on BigCommerce, keeping them in sync with your marketplace listings."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products in Neto can be approved in three ways:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Import Wizard"}], "data-id": "import"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The import wizard can be used to update the "}, {"text": "Approved for BigCommerce", "bold": true}, {"text": " field for every product at the same time. It's easiest to generate a list of product SKUs that you want approved first. You can do this one of two ways:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Generate a list from BigCommerce"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/501-product-export-wizard#simple-export", "children": [{"text": "Generate a list from Neto"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The method you use depends on your own situation. If you have products in Neto that aren't in BigCommerce that you want exported, create the list from Neto. If you don't want them in BigCommerce, generate the file in BigCommerce. In both instances you only need the SKU of the products. Once you have your file:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Import Data", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Perform complex import", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and select "}, {"text": "Start Data Import Wizard", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the Pop-up menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the "}, {"text": "Upload File", "bold": true}, {"text": " page, click the "}, {"text": "Browse", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and locate the file to upload."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step button", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The "}, {"text": "SKU", "bold": true}, {"text": " field in Neto must be matched with the "}, {"text": "SKU", "bold": true}, {"text": " field in BigCommerce."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select 'SKU*' from the "}, {"text": "Database Field Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " field dropdown menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add Extra Field", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select 'Approved For BigCommerce' from the "}, {"text": "Database Field Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Change the "}, {"text": "Column name", "bold": true}, {"text": " dropdown to 'Static Value' and a blank field will display beneath."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter 'Y' in the blank field. This will hard code the approved field so that it's yes for all the products you import."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupBigCommerce10.05T5g00000xIADuEAO.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/SetupBigCommerce10.05T5g00000xIADuEAO.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image10", "width": 700, "height": 245}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Update Existing Products Only", "bold": true}, {"text": " from the "}, {"text": "How Do You Want To update Your Database", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop down box."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Continue to Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Process File Now", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto will start updating all the product SKUs as "}, {"text": "Approved For BigCommerce", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Allow up to 10 minutes to complete the import process depending on the number of products you've imported."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto will now be able to update the prices and stock levels of your products on BigCommerce."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "BigCommerce Parcel Tracking"}], "data-id": "4"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Dispatched orders can send the consignment/tracking number back into BigCommerce, so your customers can track their order correctly.
